description_long: This is a Dell laptop with a sleek, modern design, featuring a large display with thin bezels and a vivid screen showing a mountain landscape wallpaper. The chassis is predominantly black with a matte finish, and the Dell logo is prominently displayed in silver on the back of the lid. The keyboard is backlit with RGB lighting, creating a colorful and dynamic appearance, and includes a full set of keys with a function row. The touchpad is centered below the keyboard, and the laptop appears to have a robust hinge mechanism. The sides of the laptop are relatively thin, with no visible ports in the provided views. The overall build suggests a high-quality, durable device suitable for both professional and recreational use.
description: A sleek black Dell laptop with a vibrant RGB backlit keyboard and a large display showing a mountain wallpaper. The Dell logo is visible on the lid, and the device has a modern, sturdy appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open display with a mountain wallpaper and the full RGB backlit keyboard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile and the open screen, with the keyboard and touchpad visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the black lid with the silver Dell logo centered and no visible ports or stickers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the open screen and keyboard, similar to the left side, with no visible ports.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Dell logo is visible on the center of the back lid, circular in shape with the word 'DELL' inside.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a mountain landscape wallpaper.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row and RGB backlighting; no numeric keypad is visible.
